title: StoryBrief
description: Output of the assignment-editor. Defines the approved topic, angle, and key questions before research begins.

slug.description: Proposed URL slug. Lowercase hyphenated. Specific to the incident.

title.description: Working title. May change after research.

deck.description: One-sentence summary. Max 160 chars. Must be defensible from sources.

qualityScore.description: Weighted quality score 1–10. Must be ≥ 6.0 to approve.

whyNow.description: Concrete reason this story matters today. Must name a specific event, development, or context — not a generic AI trend.

angle.description: The specific editorial angle to pursue. A single declarative sentence.

keyQuestions.description: Questions the research must answer. Drives the research-scout's agenda.

primarySourceHints.description: Leads for primary documents the research-scout should locate.

rejectionReason.description: Required if status is 'rejected'. Specific reason for rejection.

repitchConditions.description: Required if status is 'rejected'. What would need to change for this to be re-pitched.
